title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
